items.title: With Malik Beasley indicted on federal charges for gambling related to a sports betting scheme, such as point shaving and prop bets, here he is going coast-to-coast with 5 seconds left like his life depended on it just to cut the lead from 9 to 7.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
With Malik Beasley indicted on federal charges for gambling related to a sports betting scheme, such as point shaving and prop bets, here he is going coast-to-coast with 5 seconds left like his life depended on it just to cut the lead from 9 to 7.

The spread was +8.5 😭

(via HaterReport)
#NBA

media.title: Sources: Warriors eye LeBron, AD moves as Green declines option
media.description: The Warriors are prepared to pursue a reunion of LeBron James and Anthony Davis in Golden State, with Draymond Green declining his player option to open up the flexibility for such a possibility, league sources told ESPN.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Andrew Lang. Arkansas C drafted 28th in 88 by PHO. Worked way up to starter by 91 before trade to PHI in 93. Started w/PHI, ATL & MIL from 93-96, averaging 8 ppg, 6 rpg. Ended as bench guy w/CHI & NY thru 00. Good D but on O, "got the dunk down fairly well."
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Andrew Lang. Arkansas C drafted 28th in 88 by PHO. Worked way up to starter by 91 before trade to PHI in 93. Started w/PHI, ATL & MIL from 93-96, averaging 8 ppg, 6 rpg. Ended as bench guy w/CHI & NY thru 00. Good D but on O, "got the dunk down fairly well."

items.title: The Detroit Pistons will exercise the $4 million team option on Daniss Jenkins, league sources told HoopsHype. Jenkins averaged 9.3 points, including shooting 37.4% from 3-point range, with 3.9 assists in 20.2 minutes, while starting 19 of 72 games for the Pistons last season.

items.title: Bradley Beal has chosen unrestricted free agency
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Bradley Beal has chosen unrestricted free agency

The LA Clippers will maintain interest in retaining him

Beal played six games last season, all as a starter on a strict minute restriction that kept him out of fourth quarters, before undergoing season ending hip surgery in November.
